title: Baked Ginger Chicken
description: A simple and aromatic dish featuring baked chicken with a hint of ginger.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with olive oil.
Place the chicken breast on the baking sheet.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and sliced ginger.
Brush the soy sauce mixture evenly over the chicken breast.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
